content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is mildly positive with Nifty +0.6%, IT and Pharma leading on Sun Pharma deal news. VIX cooling to 18.77 is supportive. However, book is already 54% deployed with three pending CNC limits open, and several existing positions are at fresh highs requiring SL trails rather than fresh adds. Disposition: manage book first, no new entries today.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24150
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down 2.9% but PSU bank thesis intact (Q4 +35% PAT, NNPA 0.13%, sector leading +15% MTD). Still well above SL 78.00; today's intraday recovery off 78.51 low to 78.95 is constructive. Hold with current SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Up +6.3% with strong Q4 print. Trail SL from 1030 down to... wait, SL must be tightened upward for longs. Raising SL from 1030 to 1015 would LOOSEN — invalid. Correcting: tighten SL UP from 1030 to a level closer to CMP. Setting new_stop_loss to 1015 is below 1030, which loosens — REVISING in next decision."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1020.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CORRECTION: SL must be raised (tightened) on longs. Current SL 1030 is already above entry 984 (locked profit). With CMP 1045.85 and +6.3% gain, raising SL to 1020 would LOOSEN. Therefore keep SL at 1030 and only nudge target. Actually since this would be a no-op MODIFY, switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1030 (above entry 984 — breakeven+ locked). Raising further to e.g. 1035 would only give 1% room from CMP 1045.85; price action shows intraday range 1040-1060 so that risks premature stop. Best-in-class GNPA, valuation gap to peers, dividend catalyst. Hold with SL 1030."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Marginal -0.5% loss, gold consolidating near record highs. SL 119 gives ~4.5% room which is appropriate for ETF volatility. Defensive hedge worth keeping."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.0% gain, SL already at 1418 (just above entry 1412.94 — breakeven locked). Strong Q4 beat, double-digit volume growth, dividend record date pending. Tightening further would put SL too close to intraday range (1418-1437). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, earnings on Apr 30 (3 days). Binary event risk acknowledged but accumulation signals (delivery vol +47%, OI surge) and sector tailwind from Nestle support holding. SL 2295 is ~1.6% below CMP — tight enough. Will reassess immediately post-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "No-op check: current SL already at 405 (entry 404.50, breakeven+). +1.3% gain not yet at +2% trail trigger. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "+1.3% with SL already at breakeven (405 vs entry 404.50). 52-week high today, MSCI ESG upgrade, Khavda-II COD. Q4 results May 15 catalyst. Hold; will trail to 408+ once gain crosses +2%."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Flat at +0.1%. Recovery thesis (Q4 +331% QoQ, brokerage upgrades) intact but governance/SFIO overhang real. SL 855 is ~2.5% below CMP — appropriate. No action needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1760.00,
      "new_target": 1920.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Entered at 1810 yesterday, CMP 1804.50 (-0.3% on session, but stock made fresh ATH at 1824 today). Current SL 1740 is 4% below CMP — too wide given the stock has held above 1800 all morning. Tightening SL up from 1740 to 1760 (3% below CMP, just below today's intraday support 1798-1801) reduces risk while giving room for normal volatility. Target unchanged."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Wait for sector momentum to resume; SL 78 is appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already trails above entry. Further tightening would risk whipsaw given intraday 20-point range."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; 52w high today provides room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings Apr 30 — will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven (405). Will trail to 408 once gain >+2%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "INDUSINDBK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 855 already tight at -2.5%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1760.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1740 to 1760 — closer to today's intraday low 1798 base; reduces risk on a position trading 6% above prior day."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "SUNPHARMA (+7% on Organon deal) and PHARMABEES interesting but pharma rally already extended; wait for pullback. UTIAMC 6.3x volume worth tracking but didn't get full data. POWERGRID/HINDZINC/TATAPOWER limit orders still working — leaving them in book; if they fill at limits, fine; if not, will reassess tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed with 3 pending limit orders (POWERGRID 320.50, HINDZINC 612, TATAPOWER 443) that would push deployment to ~70%+ if filled. Per the deployment-hysteresis rule, NO new entries this tick. Power-cluster concentration risk flagged: NTPC + TORNTPOWER held + POWERGRID + TATAPOWER pending = 4 power names. If POWERGRID and TATAPOWER both fill, the cluster will exceed 20% combined and I will need to cancel one. Will monitor at next tick. Today's session: bias is fully toward position management, SL trails, and letting pending orders work or expire. Performance context shows only 2 wins / 2 losses in 5 days — discipline on entry quality matters more than chasing more trades."
}
